findings.summary: Attempted to fill signup forms before realizing account creation is prohibited. Wasted 3 turns navigating forms then had to refuse.
findings.evidence: OncoKB + DisGeNET form navigation, user said 'Yes fill' and agent had to refuse twice
findings.proposed_fix: Pre-check: when task involves 'sign up'/'register'/'create account', surface the prohibition immediately before navigating to any registration page

findings.summary: 4 sequential git add/commit attempts for genomics repo from selve cwd. All silently failed because git add of cross-repo paths is a no-op.
findings.evidence: 4 failed commit attempts for genomics files from selve working directory
findings.proposed_fix: When editing files in sibling repo, use git -C /path/to/repo for ALL git operations

findings.summary: Navigated OncoKB registration form through 5 tool calls before discovering .edu email requirement. Could have text-scanned requirements first.
findings.evidence: 5 browser tool calls on OncoKB before hitting .edu wall
findings.proposed_fix: For API registration: read page text/requirements via get_page_text BEFORE interacting with forms
